summary: Blocked before a verdict could be produced: The deployed site likely does not render the expected results-screen button because the app is either starting on the wrong screen (Guild/Barracks instead of results), or the BACK TO GUILD element is conditionally omitted due to a routing/state bug, failed hydration, or deployment mismatch. As a result, the test cannot find data-testid='back-to-guild' in the DOM. Underlying error: TEST BLOCKED: Clicked button "DEPLOY ARENA"
